title: cycnium recurvum
intro: Cycnium recurvum, also known as the "Yellow Toadflax", is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as relieving respiratory issues, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. Cycnium recurvum can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
